title: Article7Petition
description: An open petition challenging a real-property tax assessment in NY State Supreme Court under Article 7 of the Real Property Tax Law — the judicial escalation that can follow a Tax Commission determination. Canonical schema reconciling the 'Open Article 7 Petitions' Open Data dataset (aht6-vxai, 10 columns), published under the Office of Administrative Tax Appeals (OATA). Keyed on Petition Index Number + Petition Year.

petitionIndexNumber.description: Index number assigned when the petition was commenced ('Petition Index Number').

petitionYear.description: Year the petition was commenced ('Petition Year').

condominiumHighLotNumber.description: 'Condominium High Lot Number' — high lot of a condo lot range.

noticeOfIssuanceCode.description: 'Notice Of Issuance Code' — note-of-issue status code.
